exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your investment portfolio forward
items: Open investment accounts with your chosen brokerage and make your first contributions
Set up automatic monthly transfers to fund your investment accounts consistently
Research and implement tax-loss harvesting strategies for your taxable investment accounts
Schedule quarterly portfolio reviews to rebalance your asset allocation and track progress toward goals
Calculate and optimize your asset allocation across all accounts to minimize taxes and maximize efficiency
Research and negotiate lower expense ratios by consolidating investments with a single brokerage platform
